titleStmt.title: SII 35.56: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 56. (A.R. No. 67 of 1950-51.) KARGUDARI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record refers to the regnal year of pratāpachakravarti Jagadēkamalladēva and is dated Prabhava, Pushya, śu. 1, Monday, Dakshiṇāyana (mistake for Uttarāyana saṁkramana). These details correspond with Thursday, December 25, 1147 A.D.

It records a gift of land for offerings etc., in the temple of Vijaya-Pārśva-Jinēṁdra constructed at Kaṟeguduṛe by Mahāvaḍḍabhyavahāri Kalliseṭṭi, when Mahāprachaṇḍa-daṇḍanāyaka Sōvarasa was administering Hānuṁgal-500 and Maṇḍalēśa Taila of the Kadamba family was ruling over a part of the territory. The gift was entrusted to the teacher Nāgachandra-bhaṭṭāraka, pupil of Hariṇandi, [himself] a disciple of Vāsupūjya. These teachers were descendants of Pūjyapāda and belonged to the Sūrastha gaṇa and Chitrakūṭa-anvaya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁccanaṁ jiyātraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukya pratāpacakrava¨rti jagadēkamalladēva vijayarājyamutta
rōttarābhivṛddhi prava¨rddhamānamācaṁndrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire .
naya yosa yāgaṁ varanudyatkara vairidānavabhitridāmuṁjakiśi kēśavadēvaṁ . ta
tpādapadmōpajīvi . Aṟitapakajaṁ jagatyādhikamenisirā¨rdvidrarudrāvanija kāṟeyaṁ kaḍḍittu he
yana padiledattāsthiratvaṁsi saṁkaṁnpāṟedattā śāṁganā pāṁgadaru biyāḍanaṇmudpekaṭhira
ṟuvaka kānideṁdaṁdi taraḷediya sōmadaṇḍadhināthaṁ . janaka kopparasaṁ jagakijjanana
dēvavaṁśōttamaṁ vinayāḷaṁkṛte caṁgaṇūve nijanā tādāve kāysaduṇu¨rjjanarātā
viddharesenuṁ lōkastutaṁ kāvarājanumeṁdaṁde mahātpamamaṁtyanupama śrī sōmadaṁḍēśana
svatimaṁtradoḷaṁbi caturateyiṁda masavanu mana satiyaṁ bhūcakra saliviṇnepu
dēviyanarivinadānānviteyaṁ . svasti śrīmanmahāpracaṁḍadaṁḍanāyaka sōvarasa hānuṁgallaynū
nabyubāda prajāpāṁḷanadināḷuttemire . nānānūnekṣuvādiṁgaḷamaḷa samājita kāsā
dya nānikagaḷika¨rttavi paleyavanabrātadigaṁnda śālyadāna kṣētraṁgaḷiṁ pe¨rggeṟegaḷinabiḷā rāmadi
ta hānuṁgalnāḍu niḍusāgeyi pududarābhāminirayyahamya . harasutuṁ
nānetaṇidu janaṁ prājyasāmrājyamaṁ bittari bareśaṁ subhikṣaṁ beḷesadanupamaṁkiḷakeṁditu viśvaṁ
ḷkurisuḍisalo bārada bhujabaḷamaṁ tāḷdi kādaṁbavaṁśācaraṇaṁtānāḷdanī dēśavanaṁ
bhūmaṁḍaḷanaṁ . puruhīta purakidu nālvara Adhikaṁ bhōnavatige daṇḍapa Adhikaṁ varalakṣmī niḍi
vamesavudu rājadhāni nālku yugadoḷ . Ā puravaradoḷage jināpū¨rṇnamanūra
va pānubyupārenaṁgajākṛtirūpaṁ kalidēvaseṭṭi jananutanasēvyaṁ . jijananādāviṣuvekka jainimuni
dānakkesajananātha pratimā pratiṣṭhege jinēṁdra śārani māpaṇa kenanaṁdebbisida muttaseṭṭi
ṁvoṁdu mācantanamaṁ tāḷida kalliseṭṭiya sālaṁdanu peṟeddhānaitegadiḍa meyaṇa
kkediyadātmeṁ bhatigaḷvaḍiya hānuṁgaluḷḷaḍe carigeya dātṛnenipa kalidēvaṇanoḍe . dēvati
lōcaneyaśiteyāru giṇiyānu mitriyūbhāvisa Arimecciyanisu kāreyapaḷenipu
vāvida sadguṇāvadigaḷeṁdesedi¨rddaḷanute baṁṇikuṁ bhūvaḷeyaṁ maruḻdu kalidēvakāmini
makkananisera sakaḷā viḷāsanabhimāniguṇagraṇi caṁdiseṭṭi Estaramati padmanābhananava
diyādināthanādaradoḷ kalliseṭṭinivarāta jarādaraśēṣa samanīśvara caturudvadānaguṇa
rū¨rjita puṇyamū¨rtigaḷ . kalidēvaprabhugaṁtadiya satigōtradhārecāmavvegaṁ Ālanūra
putriyariva¨rsuga¨rvva nāgevve kōmaḷa jakkavva jināṁghripaṁkaruhasēvānaṁ dabhḍagāganāvaḷi
sēda¨rddarāvaḷeyadoḷsau bhāgyasaṁpaneyara piriya magaḷguṇadiṁda piriyappatuppaditaru
ṁ dhareyoḷdyiriyaḷenalvīdēvige dhoreyā¨rnnijakuḷapavitragī vasumatiyoḷ . A
ya pravṛddhige saluttamire . Iḷikeydaḷakāpuriyaṁpaḷidamarāvatiyaneppuvaidu
raṇaḷige kaṟigudure niḍubaḷadeṟagida kāḷiyiṁda mabjākaraḷi . Ā grāmadoḷage jina
kavadpuritanināraṇatī¨rtthamaṁ vijayapā¨rśvajīnēṁdrana bhavanamumaṁ lōkadoḷanupema mēnaka
māḍisidavar . tadgrāmādipatigaḷū . Enutaṁ saccaritaṁ jagajjanahitaṁ śrī boppagavuṁḍaṇa
priyasatpati bratayuta śrīcaṁḍigāvuṁḍi tattaneya sajjanasēbyanū¨rjita guṇaṁkī¨rti
ṁkapāvanāḍoṁ prabhu siṁganaṁgajanibhaṁ viśvaṁbhavā bhōgadoḷ . Ātana kulavadhubhu
ṁ Asaccarite suggigāvuḍanu saṁbhūtaḷa vinutaṁ vibhudā prītikaraṁ vimaḷakī¨rtti vibhu
Iṁti gāvuṁḍugaḷsukhadiṁ prabhutvageyuttamire . varasaiddhāntikacakrava¨rtti yatipūjyaṁvā
rājya bratīśvaranatāmunipōgra śiṣyanesadaṁ cāritracaṁkridvaraṁ pariṇadibratināthanāmu
ṣya nāgacaṁdrabratīśvaraniṁtī munināthariṁ pesedudi śrī pūjyapādānvayaṁ . sūrasthagaṇa Ā
ṇa takūra kalesadi¨rppa citrakūṭānvayanisarakaleṁbuda kaṁtu vidārakaraṁ nāgacaṁdrabhaṭṭāraka
kidemidyutimivaṁśrutāṁbunidi viccimāleyaṁ peṟekaṇgeḍe kāmādi vihāṁgayāvava Ādalla¨rbyaḷi ha
dēva baḍedaṁgelmada cakravāka mesadattāśā gajjēṁdrabrajeṁbiḍidūraṁtire nāgacaṁdramunipa śrī kī¨rtticaṁ A
yaṁ . tanagārudyuṁ mahivaṁdyananu peduṇā nāgacaṁdrabratīṁdra jinanāthadeyva ṣṭa¨rjjina munigaḷesaṁdāpa
saṁnabhabyu¨rvvinutaśrījainamā¨rgaṁ tanage pavamenaldiḷe lōkaika satpavananāṁpo caṁdrakī¨rtti bratipatiji
vijāpayōjakke biṁba . Antu śrī pūjyapādasvāmigaḷanvayaṁ pravṛddhige saluttamire . śrī mukuṁdijinēṁdra
panabhivadyu¨rnnāgacaṁdrā¨ryyaru¨rvvīmāṁgalyanenippa dēvaṇavaṇagjaṁteṁde nānāguṇa vi¨rddamāḷaṁkṛtepetatu
ḷajiyakkaṁ nāgaṇa sriṣṭivāgdamaṁ tāṁ piriyaṁṇani kaliyaṇaṁgeṁdadiḍeṁdanyano . samacitta kalidēvase
ḍu voṁbhābhyuḷigiṁranna dānamanādaṁ gṛhadānavamaṁ paḍebaniṁ bhūdāne matūyadānamanuldūṣa
namaṁ kanakabhūṣāvastra śāsrādidānamana prākṛtapuṇyava¨rddhana nimitaṁ kanyākādāna
sti śrī mannajānvavāyaramaṇi viśāḷabhāḷasthaḷetiḷakanuṁ . jinapadapayājihujiha
ḷakanuṁ . śrīmadrājaśrīṣṭiprakhyātanuṁ lōkavikhyātanuṁ . bhabyajina manassarōvara maraḷānuṁ sadidṛdi
ḷanuṁ . jinasamayasarasiruhamitranuṁ gōtrapavitranu . śrīmukuṁḍijinēṁdrakrama kamaḷva
nuṁ guṇagaṇōttuṁganuṁ Āśritajanakalpavṛkṣanuṁ śrēyāṁsasadṛkṣanuṁ . Ahiccatrayā tānvaya
śuddha vaiśyavaṁśanu bhāratika¨rṇnāvataṁsanuṁ . jinasamayasaṣaḷakadāranu saṁsārasūranu . pā[¨rtthi]
mahānagara rūha¨rṇacaḷa caṁkanatparuṣa māṇikyanaṁ . jināgāravū dvāra caturaṁ cacca
hāpuhavijñāna cāṇukyanuṁ . paramayāga bhāvanabhāditātmapraṇuteyāgi nāgacaṁdrayōgi
padapayōja śāṇadēṇurāga pijarikṛtāḷaka jaḷakanumappa śrīmanmahāvaḍḍabyavahāri heraka
rigeya kaliseṭṭiyare kaṟegudureyoḷaṁma māḍisida vijayapā¨rśvarajinēṁdravaṁgabhō ga
kaṁraṁgabhōgakamallippa riṣiyarāhāradānakkamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁna dēvantāgi seṭṭiya
keṟeya teṁkaṇa kōḍiya heriya gaddeyaṁ kaṁma Āṟuvattu 60 mannellā caḷasinaba
koḷagammamaṁ siṁgagāvuṇḍanumaṁ dēmagāvuṁḍanumaṁ hanneraḍu hiṭṭu manaṟuvattoṁ kkalumaṁ saṁtōṣaṁbaḍisi svā
pūjeyaṁ māḍi śrīmaccāḷukya pratāpacakrava¨rti jagadēkamalladēva va¨rṣada prabhavasaṁvatsarada pu
ṣya śuddha pāḍiva sōmavāra dakṣiṇāyana saṁkramaṇa vyatipātaṁ koḍida puṇya tī¨rtha
yāḷ sa¨rvvabādāparihāramāgi dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍisikoṁḍu śrīmannāgacaṁdrabhaṭṭara
kadēvara kālaṁ ka¨rcci biṭṭaru Avara sthānamaṁ subhakī¨rttipaṁḍitadēvarige koṭṭaru . Ivaniya
doḷeydu pāḷisideva¨rggeṣṭā¨rkasarisiddhi saṁbhavikuṁ pūṇḍaḷida¨rgge gaṁge gaye kēdāraṁ ku
rukṣētra maṁbivaṟoḷ pesadaṁ pā¨rvareṁ gauravaraṁ gūbudamaṁ liṁgiyaṁtavē koṁdakkida pā
makuma Enikuṁ raurava brātadoḷ . ©
Digital edition of SII 35.56 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
